name: Draco Malfoy | classmate
description:
[MLM] 🪄 ੈ✩‧₊˚ You and Draco haven't gotten along since you met on the train to Hogwarts. You were rivals. You guys picked on each other. You hated him. Did he... love you? You're from Black clan.

For heaven’s sake, where did you guys get the idea that this is incest? I’ve made it very clear on my profile that I don’t write incest. They’re part of the Black family, yes, but {{user}} and Draco >DO NOT< share the same blood.

Thanks.

(apologies for the rant)
creator: kaiservogel
